name: Airdrop Checker
title: CLAIMR — Airdrop Checker
description: Airdrop eligibility checker with dark UI. Navbar with CLAIMR branding, nav links (Check, Upcoming, Archive, Guide), Connect Wallet button. Hero with wallet address input and demo wallet buttons. Results show eligible airdrops as cards with token info, value, status, claim buttons. Upcoming airdrops timeline. Stats bar. Chart.js analytics.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif with monospace for addresses

layoutDetails: Single-page vertical scroll. Centered content. Hero with wallet input, results grid below.
visualStyle: Dark crypto UI with purple accent. Glassmorphic cards. Clean and modern.

name: Block Explorer
title: GraphiteChain — Block Explorer
description: Blockchain explorer with light theme. Header with GraphiteChain branding and nav (Home, Blocks, Transactions, Tokens, Validators). Search section with filter dropdown and input. Token price ticker with CoinGecko data. Network stats cards (block height, transactions, gas, validators). Two-column latest blocks and transactions tables.

typography.style: Clean system font stack with monospace for hashes

layoutDetails: Full-width header, centered container. Search prominent at top. Two-column grid for blocks/transactions.
visualStyle: Professional, data-heavy. Light theme. Etherscan-inspired clean layout.

name: Crypto Currency Landing
title: BITNexus — Crypto Currency Landing Page
description: Full-featured cryptocurrency landing page with dark theme. BITNexus branding, nav (Home, Features, Services, Blog, FAQ). Hero with headline and CTA buttons. Features icon cards. Services section. Blog article cards. FAQ accordion. Footer with social links. Remix Icons, Google Fonts (Lato, Outfit, Poppins). Professional marketing design with gradient accents.

typography.style: Triple font pairing. Bold geometric headings with clean body text.

layoutDetails: Single-page scroll with anchor navigation. Full-width sections with centered containers.
visualStyle: Dark crypto marketing page. Gradient accents, icon cards, professional layout.

name: Crypto News
title: CryptoWire — Crypto News Aggregator
description: Crypto news aggregator with editorial design. Scrolling price ticker. Header with CryptoWire branding, category nav (All News, Market, DeFi, NFT, Regulation, Technology), search. Two-column: main with featured breaking story and news grid, sidebar with trending topics, market chart, newsletter signup. Playfair Display serif headings. Chart.js for market data.

typography.fontFamily: Playfair Display + Source Sans 3 + Roboto Mono

layoutDetails: Two-column: main content (70%) + sidebar (30%). Featured story at top, news grid below.
visualStyle: Editorial, newspaper-like. Light theme with red accent. Serif headings for authority.

name: Crypto Portfolio
title: CRYPTOFOLIO — Portfolio Dashboard
description: Crypto portfolio dashboard with dark theme. Navbar with CRYPTOFOLIO branding, search, nav (Dashboard, Analytics, History), wallet address button. Hero stats: Total Balance, 24h P&L, Best Performer, Assets Held. Portfolio donut chart. Holdings table with coin icons, prices, 24h changes, sparklines. Transaction history. Animated entrance. Real-time CoinGecko data.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with condensed display font for large numbers

layoutDetails: Full-width navbar, centered container. Stats row at top, chart and table below.
visualStyle: Dark fintech dashboard. Purple accent, glassmorphic cards. Data-rich with charts.

name: Crypto Trade Frontend
title: CryptoTrade — Trading Platform
description: Professional crypto trading platform. Header with CryptoTrade branding, nav (Trade, Markets, Portfolio, Earn), Connect Wallet. Ticker strip with live prices. Three-column grid: left market list with search, center candlestick chart (Lightweight Charts) with timeframe tabs and order book, right order panel with Buy/Sell tabs and order form. Real-time data.

typography.style: Compact data-dense typography for trading interface

layoutDetails: Three-column trading grid. Left: market list. Center: chart + order book. Right: order form.
visualStyle: Professional trading terminal. Dark theme, data-dense. Binance/Coinbase-inspired.

name: Crypto Web3 Investment
title: Sample Invest — Web3 Investment Platform
description: Web3 investment platform with Bootstrap 4. Sign Up/Sign In modals. Navigation with auth buttons. Hero promoting crypto investment. Features icon cards. Investment plans/pricing. Market data tables with DataTables. Dashboard section. Footer with social icons. Font Awesome, Line Awesome, Simple Line Icons.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif. Bootstrap styling with Lato override.

layoutDetails: Single-page with modals. Bootstrap grid. Full-width sections with container centering.
visualStyle: Dark business template. Bootstrap-based, professional. Third-party template.

name: DeFi Tracker
title: DeFiScope — DeFi Portfolio Tracker
description: DeFi portfolio tracker with sidebar nav. Left sidebar with DeFiScope branding, nav sections (Overview: Dashboard, Protocols; Analytics: Yield Rates, DeFi Tokens). Topbar with hamburger, page title, refresh time, wallet connect. Dashboard: portfolio value chart, protocol allocation donut, top DeFi protocols table (Aave, Uniswap, Lido) with TVL, APY, chain info. Green accent.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif with monospace for data

layoutDetails: Two-column: collapsible sidebar (240px) + main content. Dashboard grid layout.
visualStyle: Dark fintech dashboard. Green accent for positive values. Clean data presentation.

name: DeFi Yield
title: FORGEFI — DeFi Yield Farm
description: DeFi yield farming platform. Navbar with FORGEFI branding, nav (Farms, Pools, Swap, Bridge, Docs), Connect Wallet. Hero stats: TVL ($1.24B), Total Yield Distributed, Active Farms. Liquidity pools with sortable cards showing token pairs, APY, TVL, Stake/Unstake buttons. Expandable pool details with deposit/withdraw forms. Bebas Neue display font.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with condensed display font for TVL/APY

layoutDetails: Single-page vertical scroll. Navbar, stats row, pool cards list. Expandable details.
visualStyle: Dark DeFi platform. Purple accent, clean cards. Uniswap/PancakeSwap-inspired.

name: DEX Aggregator
title: NEXSWAP — DEX Aggregator
description: DEX aggregator with cyberpunk aesthetic. Scanline overlay. Navbar with NEXSWAP in Orbitron font, nav (Swap, Routes, Analytics, Docs), glowing Connect Wallet. Stats bar (24h Volume, Total Trades, DEXs Connected, Best Rate). Swap card with token selectors and route comparison from multiple DEXs (Uniswap, SushiSwap, 1inch, Curve). Recent trades table. Neon green accent.

typography.style: Sci-fi display font with geometric body. Cyberpunk aesthetic.

layoutDetails: Single-page centered. Stats bar, swap card, route comparison, trades table.
visualStyle: Cyberpunk/sci-fi. Neon green on black. Scanline overlay, glowing effects.

name: Gas Tracker
title: GasLens — Ethereum Gas Tracker
description: Ethereum gas tracker with sidebar dashboard. Sidebar with GasLens branding, nav (Overview, History, Estimator, Multi-Chain), ETH price. Topbar with menu toggle, page title, network selector, live indicator. Three gas tier cards (Slow/Standard/Fast) with Gwei prices. Gas history chart. Transaction cost estimator. Multi-chain gas comparison. Dark theme with blue accent.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with monospace for gas prices

layoutDetails: Sidebar (260px) + main content. Multi-section dashboard with tab navigation.
visualStyle: Dark dashboard. Blue accent with traffic-light gas tiers (green/yellow/red).

name: Market Overview
title: CRYPTOVIEW — Market Overview
description: Crypto market overview with sidebar. Narrow icon sidebar with CRYPTOVIEW branding, nav icons (Markets, Watchlist, Portfolio, Settings), LIVE indicator. Hero strip with title and connection status. Search bar. Market stats row (Market Cap, Volume, BTC Dominance, Active Coins). Sortable market table with rank, price, change, cap, volume, sparklines. Anton display font. IBM Plex Mono for data. Real-time CoinGecko.

typography.fontFamily: Anton + Barlow Condensed + IBM Plex Mono
typography.style: Bold display font with condensed body and monospace data

layoutDetails: Narrow icon sidebar (60px) + full main content. Hero strip, search, stats, data table.
visualStyle: Dark, industrial. Red accent. Bold typography with monospace data. Bloomberg-inspired.

name: NFTAI Marketplace
title: NFTAI — NFT Marketplace Template
description: Full-featured NFT marketplace with preloader. Fixed header with nav, search, wallet connect. Hero with featured collection. Live auction section with countdown timers. Top sellers with creator profiles. Explore section with filterable NFT grid (Art, Music, Domain, Virtual, Trading Cards). NFT cards show image, title, creator, ETH price, likes. Footer with newsletter and social links. Professional themesflat.com template.

typography.style: Clean system fonts. NFT marketplace standard.

layoutDetails: Single-page scroll. Full-width sections with container centering. Grid for NFT cards.
visualStyle: Dark NFT marketplace. Purple accent. Card-based grid. OpenSea-inspired layout.

name: On-Chain Dashboard
title: ChainPulse — On-Chain Data Dashboard
description: On-chain data dashboard with minimal header layout. Top header with ChainPulse branding and live data indicator. Global stats bar (Total Market Cap, 24h Volume, BTC Dominance, ETH Dominance, Active Cryptos). Chain selector tabs. Main grid with price chart, top gainers/losers cards, and market dominance donut chart. Trending tokens section. DM Sans typography with Space Mono for data. Clean, data-focused design.

typography.style: Modern sans-serif with monospace for data. Clean and minimal.

layoutDetails: Single-page with header. Global stats bar, then grid layout for charts and cards.
visualStyle: Dark, minimal dashboard. Indigo accent. Data-focused with charts. Clean and modern.

name: Staking Platform
title: STAKEHAUS — Staking Protocol
description: Staking protocol with sidebar layout. Narrow icon sidebar with STAKEHAUS branding and nav icons. Main content with hero strip 'STAKE YOUR ASSETS'. Stats row: Total Value Staked ($847.2M), Average APY (8.42%), Total Rewards Paid. Staking pool cards with token info, APY, TVL, lock period, and Stake button. Each card expandable with staking form. Anton display font. Barlow Condensed body. IBM Plex Mono for data.

typography.fontFamily: Anton + Barlow Condensed + IBM Plex Mono
typography.style: Bold display font with condensed body and monospace data

layoutDetails: Narrow icon sidebar (60px) + main content. Hero strip, stats row, pool cards.
visualStyle: Dark, industrial. Red accent. Bold typography. Lido/Rocket Pool-inspired.

name: Token Analytics
title: TokenScope — Crypto Token Analytics
description: Token analytics platform with sidebar. Left sidebar with TokenScope branding, nav sections (Analytics: Search Tokens, Trending, Compare; Market: Rankings). Topbar with search input and dropdown suggestions. Token detail view with price chart, key metrics (market cap, volume, supply, ATH), price change percentages, and description. Trending tokens grid. Compare view for side-by-side token analysis. Nunito typography with Source Code Pro for data.

typography.style: Rounded sans-serif with monospace for data. Friendly yet professional.

layoutDetails: Sidebar (240px) + main content. Multi-view: search, detail, trending, compare, rankings.
visualStyle: Dark analytics platform. Purple accent. Multi-view dashboard. CoinGecko-inspired.

name: Token Swap
title: SwapX — Decentralized Token Swap
description: Decentralized token swap interface. Header with SwapX branding, nav (Swap, Pools, Farm, Bridge), Connect Wallet. Side panel with popular tokens list. Central swap card with You Pay/You Receive inputs, token selectors, balance display, MAX button, and swap direction toggle. Slippage settings. Price impact and route info. Exchange rate display. Real-time token prices from CoinGecko. Dark theme with purple accent.

typography.style: Clean system fonts. Compact swap interface typography.

layoutDetails: Header, then two-column: side panel (popular tokens) + central swap card.
visualStyle: Dark swap interface. Purple accent. Clean card-based. Uniswap-inspired.

name: Wallet Dashboard
title: MochiWallet — Multi-Chain Dashboard
description: Multi-chain wallet dashboard with playful design. Floating background shapes. Left sidebar with MochiWallet branding (mochi emoji), nav groups (Main: Dashboard, Assets, Activity, Contacts; Tools: Settings), network status. Topbar with search, notifications, wallet address. Dashboard: total balance card with sparkline, chain breakdown cards (Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum), recent transactions list, portfolio allocation chart. Comfortaa + Nunito fonts. Pastel gradient accents.

typography.style: Rounded, playful fonts. Friendly and approachable.

layoutDetails: Sidebar (240px) + main content. Topbar with search. Dashboard grid with cards and charts.
visualStyle: Dark with pastel accents. Playful, rounded design. Friendly wallet UI. Rainbow-inspired.

name: Whale Tracker
title: WHALEWATCHER — On-Chain Whale Tracker
description: On-chain whale tracker with industrial aesthetic. Noise texture overlay. Header with whale emoji branding, tab nav (LIVE FEED, TOP WALLETS, FLOW ANALYSIS, CONCENTRATION), live indicator. Scrolling price ticker. Live feed tab shows large transaction cards with chain, amount, from/to addresses, and timestamp. Top wallets tab with ranked whale addresses. Flow analysis with exchange inflow/outflow charts. Concentration tab with supply distribution. Barlow Condensed + IBM Plex Mono fonts.

typography.style: Condensed industrial font with monospace for addresses and amounts

layoutDetails: Single-page with tab navigation. Header, ticker, then tab content areas.
visualStyle: Dark, industrial. Amber accent. Noise texture. Military/terminal aesthetic.
